channel.title: PPG12 Analysis Results
channel.description: Isolated Photon Cross-Section, pp √s = 200 GeV — sPHENIX

item.title: sPHENIX isolated photons on the world xT-scaling curve
item.description: We place the PPG12 sPHENIX isolated-photon measurement on the world x_T-scaling curve of direct-photon cross sections, reproducing Fig.~1 (left) of arXiv:1901.10950 (Bock, Hard Probes 2018). After sc…

item.title: Vertex Reweighting Method Comparison: Reco-vertex vs. No-reweight vs. Truth-vertex: Correcting the MBDvertex efficiency for raw-beam luminosity
item.description: The current ``nominal'' reco-vertex reweight (vertex\_reweight\_on: 1) silently drops MC events with z_ reco=-9999 (no global vertex reconstructed, i.e. MBD trigger failed) because they fall outside…

item.title: Impact of MC z-Vertex Reweighting on the Nominal Isolated-Photon Cross Section and MBD Efficiency
item.description: [H] [width=0.98]figures/vtxreweight/vtxreweight_comparison.pdf Left: MBDvertex efficiency (g_ mbd\_eff) from the nominal (bdt\_nom, vertex reweight on) and no-reweight (bdt\_vtxreweight0) configs. Ri…

item.title: MC Vertex Reweighting for PPG12: A Data-Driven Iterative Method on the Truth Vertex
item.description: The PPG12 efficiency pipeline must reweight MC to match the measured p+p luminous region, which is very different between the two crossing angles (53 cm at 0 mrad vs 22 cm at 1.5 mrad, Piwinski narro…

item.title: -vertex reweight: derivation target and post-pipeline closure sPHENIX Internal — PPG12 isolated-photon cross-section
item.description: Executive summary The postdoc's two questions, answered up front:

item.title: Tower-Index Acceptance Map Integration: Data-Driven Dead-Tower Masks + Cross-Section Systematic
item.description: Four-level tower-index acceptance maps (h_ etaphi\_tower\_\preselect,common,tight,tight\_iso\\_\mc\_inclusive,data\) are now populated automatically in the official efficiency pipeline and written to…

item.title: Tight-BDT Lower-Bound Crosscheck — Leakage-Corrected ABCD Purity: Nominal parametric tight cut vs. flat BDT>0.70/0.80/0.85/0.90/0.95
item.description: Summary To probe the sensitivity of the ABCD leakage-corrected purity to the tight-region BDT lower bound, the flat tight-cut crosscheck series (BDT>0.70/0.80/0.85/0.90/0.95) was built out by adding…

item.title: Sample Combining Validation: Truth Spectra (signal + background)
item.description: We validate that the 8 SI/DI MC sample pairs (photon5/10/20 signal, jet8/12/20/30/40 background; each with \_nom + \_double = 16 per-period files) combine correctly into the signal and jet-inclusive…

item.title: Photon Reco Efficiency in PPG12 — Value and Inefficiency Breakdown: _reco92%, where the missing 8 % goes
item.description: Headline for direct/fragmentation photons in PPG12 is essentially flat at 92% across the cross-section pT range, with a small drop at the bottom of the spectrum. The remaining 8% inefficiency is shar…

item.title: ABCD Purity Non-Closure: Non-Tight BDT Lower Bound and Flat Threshold Partitions
item.description: We scan the non-tight BDT lower bound (analysis.non\_tight.bdt\_min) from its nominal value of 0.02 to 0.05 and 0.10 and quantify the ABCD purity non-closure against the MC truth purity in each of th…

item.title: ABCD Purity Bootstrap — Uncertainty Quantification: Comparison of Gaussian fit, Crystal Ball, and equal-tail percentile (median + 16/84%)
item.description: Question The current PPG12 ABCD purity is reported as the mean and width of a Gaussian fit to a 20 000-throw Poisson bootstrap of the four region yields (A,B,C,D) plus Gaussian smearing of the signal…

item.title: Updates Since Preliminary Result: BDT, NPB Removal, Double Interactions, and Shower Shape Comparisons
item.description: This report summarizes the major analysis updates implemented since the preliminary isolated photon cross-section result in pp collisions at s = 200~ with sPHENIX Run~24 data. Four work streams are c…

item.title: PPG12 Cross-Check: Parametric Tight / Non-Tight BDT-Pair Variants: ABCD Closure Stress Test at Extreme BDT Cut Combinations
item.description: The PPG12 analysis uses an ABCD method for background subtraction, parametrised by E_T-dependent tight and non-tight BDT thresholds. To probe the stability of the background estimate under simultaneo…

item.title: Investigation: MC Purity Correction Factor in PPG12
item.description: The PPG12 isolated photon cross-section measurement employs the ABCD method to estimate photon purity from data. The four ABCD regions are defined by two axes: a BDT-based tight/non-tight classificat…

item.title: Isolation E_T Definition Comparison: 60 MeV Tower Threshold vs. 120 MeV vs. Topo-Cluster R=0.4
item.description: The isolated photon cross-section measurement relies on a reconstruction-level isolation energy cut to define the signal region in the ABCD method. Three isolation definitions are available in the sl…

item.title: Isolation cone centering fix: |v_z|-dependent mis-centering between cluster COG and tower centers, and an ownership-excluded iso variant
item.description: The manual tower-based and topo-cluster isolation computations in anatreemaker/source/CaloAna24.cc used RawClusterUtility::GetPseudorapidity(cluster, vertex) as the cone axis. That projects the clust…

item.title: Shower Shape Comparison: Nominal vs Double-Interaction Mixed MC: 0 mrad (22.4% DI) and 1.5 mrad (7.9% DI) Crossing Angles
item.description: In pp collisions at RHIC, two independent collisions can occur in the same bunch crossing (double interaction / pileup), distorting reconstructed cluster kinematics and shower shapes. To quantify thi…

item.title: Double-Interaction (Pileup) Effects in PPG12: Efficiency, Shower Shapes, Truth-Vertex Reweighting, Cluster Size, and Energy Response
item.description: Run-24 pp data at s = 200 contain two crossing-angle periods (0 mrad and 1.5 mrad) with very different pileup conditions, where two independent collisions in the same bunch crossing shift the reconst…

item.title: Donut iso variants: inner-R truth-purity scan and ABCD closure: All-calo 120 MeV donut with R_outer=0.4 (cross-check)
item.description: Two new reco-isolation definitions were added as cross-check variants (syst\_type=None, syst\_role=None): donutFull (use\_topo\_iso=4): cluster\_iso\_04 - cluster\_iso\_\005,0075,02\. All-calo 120 Me…

item.title: Converted vs. Unconverted Photons: Shower Shape, Isolation, and Energy Response in photon10 MC
item.description: We study the impact of photon conversions (pre-EMCal pair production in detector material) on reconstruction observables used by the PPG12 isolated-photon cross-section measurement in pp at s=200~GeV…
